subcodes.first_line: The missive addressed to that esteemed one, which thou didst dispatch under the name of God, the Mahdi, hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب که باسم الله مهدی ارسال داشتید مشاهده شد و اینکه ذکر نموده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
